limitations: Lifecycle records are not production tickets.
domains.name: Vulnerability Lifecycle

limitations: Local portfolio evidence, not regulatory certification.
Milestone 10 does not implement dashboards, external reporting, ticketing or Security Champions.
Portfolio demonstration policy, not Genomics England policy.
Repository is not deployed; decisions are release-assurance evidence only.
Milestone 8 does not implement formal exception workflow or lifecycle closure.
release_decision.rationale: Release is conditionally passable with required approvals for 36 finding(s).
required_actions: Review reference infrastructure control before production deployment.
Review the suppression before expiry and keep compensating controls current.
Track upstream fix availability and rebuild the image when a fix is published.
